info.title: Gather API
info.description: Social scheduling API for coordinating meetups with friends based on mutual availability

calendarIds.description: External calendar IDs to import. Unselected calendars will have importEnabled set to false.

message.example: Can we do an hour later?

userIds.description: User IDs to query busy times for (must be the current user or accepted friends)

post.description: Handle Apple Sign In callback and create/update user

get.description: Get blocked time windows for the current user (times when NOT available)

post.description: Create a new blocked time window (mark time as unavailable)

patch.description: Update an existing blocked time window

delete.description: Delete an existing blocked time window

get.description: Get all calendar connections for the current user
Get busy time slots from connected calendars

post.description: Bulk sync calendars and their events from the device. Upserts calendar connections, syncs cached events, and removes deselected calendars.

get.description: Get a specific calendar connection by ID
Get the Google OAuth consent URL for the current user to authorize calendar access
List the user's Google calendars (fetched live from Google API). Requires an existing Google connection.

post.description: Choose which Google calendars to import for availability tracking
Trigger a server-side re-sync of all connected Google calendars for the current user

get.description: Get the Outlook OAuth consent URL for the current user to authorize calendar access
List the user's Outlook calendars (fetched live from Microsoft Graph API). Requires an existing Outlook connection.

post.description: Choose which Outlook calendars to import for availability tracking
Trigger a server-side re-sync of all connected Outlook calendars for the current user

post.summary: Generate an emoji for given text
post.description: Generate a single emoji that represents the provided text using AI, with caching

get.description: Get events for the current user
Get a specific event by ID

post.description: Get busy time intervals for specified users within a date range. Returns a map of userId to sorted, merged busy intervals from all sources (blocked windows, calendar events, and in-app events).

400.description: Validation error or invalid user IDs

get.description: Get all friends of the current user

post.description: Send a friend request to another user

delete.description: Remove a friend or cancel a friend request

get.description: Get all groups owned by the current user
Get the profile of the currently authenticated user

patch.description: Update the profile of the currently authenticated user

delete.description: Delete the currently authenticated user account

post.description: Register a push notification token for the current user

get.description: Get the notification preferences for the current user

put.description: Update the notification preferences for the current user
